TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ukraine, title = Ukraine, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ukraine} }

S.FORM: Ukraine hya' ga cyux maki' tay 49 00 N, 32 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 603,550 sq km (maki' tay 46ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 579,330 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 24,220 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 44,209,733. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga71.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 16.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 12%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kyiv. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 24 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Petro Poroshenko, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Currently Volodymyr Zelensky is President of Ukraine, since 20 May 2019. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Ukraine hya' ga cyux maki' tay 49 00 N, 32 00 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 603,550 sq km (maki' tay 46ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 579,330 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 24,220 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 44,209,733. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga71.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 16.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 12%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kyiv. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 24 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Petro Poroshenko, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Currently Volodymyr Zelensky is President of Ukraine, since 20 May 2019. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ukraine ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a kji*. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a petro poros~…ēńßenko, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®urrentlj *olo*jmjr zelens~…ēkj is~…ē pres~…ēi*ent o* ukraine, s~…ēin ¶~ ®e ** maj ****. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
